CommandDefinition.Name: addlocalworkspacetorepository
CommandDefinition.Description: Add a local workspace to a repository

Argument.Name: subPath
Argument.Description: Path inside the repository to where the workspace should be

Argument.Name: workspace
Argument.Description: Workspace to to add to the repository

Argument.Name: split
Argument.Description:
Decides how workspace config is stored. Possible values:
none: write everything into workspace.xml
bytype: create a config folder and one file per config type
fine: create a config folder, a folder for ervery config type and a file for every configuration entry
If not specified the existing config is reused. If there is no existing config, none is used.

BoolOption.Name: e
BoolOption.Description: add the entire revision folder to repository instead of just saved/XMOM and workspace-xml
